caption: 🥊 Omega-3 vs Omega-9 — Which one wins? 💙 Omega-3 takes the lead. Your body can’t produce Omega-3, so you must get it from food or supplements. It supports ❤️ heart health, 🧠 brain function, 🔥 reduces inflammation, and 💪 aids recovery. Bottom line: Both are healthy fats, but Omega-3 should be your priority. 💬 Do you include Omega-3 in your daily diet?
